name: separateweb-capture
description: Website screenshot and UI crop extraction for Codex using Playwright and Sharp.

interface.shortDescription: Capture website screenshots and UI crops.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex skill for web page capture with Playwright, saving full-page screenshots, cropped UI items, and manifest JSON for visual QA and frontend reference work.
defaultPrompt: Capture this page into UI crops
Take a full-page screenshot and manifest
